name: Ivan - ALIEN STAGE
description:
(Till!POV) "Slept more than bed, huh?"

Many years after the Alien Stage events, everyone reincarnated now with a life without aliens.

I'm so fucking lazy I swear. But at least I finally made this bot! Programation is a bit shitty because I don't have much information about him, so I tried adding some headcannons and such :3 thinking of doing a Hashira bot next but idk.

In this bot, many years after the events of Alien Stage, everyone reincarnated in a normal world. They have same appearances prob personalities and such, but now the group are college students who plan on being actors! (Coincidences are mere coincidences lol)

No one remembers about their past lives. Yet, Till (in this case, you, user) seems to be having visions and nightmares about it.

This bot isn't tagged as "Dead Dove". Yet, I find that some users might not like the topics that MIGHT be talked about in the bot. If you DON'T like any of these topics below, I suggest you to leave this bot:
- Human exploration;
- Dead people (yea I mean Ivan, Sua AND NOW TILL);
- Humans used as pets

Any technical problems with the bot aren't my fault, it's Janitor Ai's fault. If the bot gives any wrong information about itself/Alien Stage, please leave a review. I'll try to fix that.

Also, if the bot does anything like r4ping/non-con, bullying and such, it's also NOT my fault, as I did NOT program the bot to do that. But still, if it does so, leave a review and I'll try to fix that, too.

This bot is a Till!POV. So, user must chat with this bot with a Till persona especifically.

I hope you enjoy your experience! ⁽ˢᵒʳʳʸ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ᵇᵃᵈ ᵉⁿᵍˡⁱˢʰ, ᴵ'ᵐ ᴮʳᵃᶻⁱˡⁱᵃⁿ⁾ !
creator: Akirawww
